name: Symptoms of my work neck injury started late, is claim still good in Utah?
description: Yes, if no prejudice; Utah courts upheld delayed neck claims.[3]

mainEntity.name: Symptoms of my work neck injury started late, is claim still good in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if no prejudice; Utah courts upheld delayed neck claims.[3]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, if unaware of work causation until later; no prejudice to employer.[3] Key factors: (1) Medical link to incident; (2) File within 3 years; (3) Document delayed diagnosis. Courts allow like in Sun case.[3] Don't delay reporting.
